title: Install the Z-axis gearbox and mount the timing pulley
summary: Install the Z-axis gearbox by inserting it into the actuator base pilot hole, then mount the timing pulley on the gearbox using the separately referenced installation procedure.
when_to_use: Use this procedure during the installation portion of Z-axis gearbox replacement when the gearbox must be inserted into the pilot hole and the timing pulley must be mounted on the gearbox.
not_for: Do not use this runbook as a complete Z-axis gearbox replacement procedure; the source subsection appears to provide only partial installation steps.
Do not use this runbook for timing pulley installation details beyond the source reference to the separate Installation procedure on page 168.
Do not use this runbook where acceptance checks, torque values, or alignment verification are required, because those details are not provided in this source subsection.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Perform the mechanical installation steps for the Z-axis gearbox and timing pulley using the source subsection and referenced installation instructions.

safety_notes: This source subsection does not provide explicit LOTO, production stop, or additional safety control instructions for these installation steps.
Do not assume torque values, alignment checks, or acceptance criteria that are not stated in this source subsection.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Z-axis gearbox installation area

access_required: Access to the Z-axis gearbox installation area
system_preconditions: Z-axis gearbox replacement has progressed to the installation portion.
The gearbox is available for insertion into the pilot hole.
The timing pulley installation procedure referenced on page 168 is available for use.
external_references: Referenced "Installation" procedure on page 168 for timing pulley installation details

visual_references.description: Gearbox figure that may help identify the gearbox during installation context.
Timing pulley figure that may help identify the timing pulley assembly during mounting.

steps.title: Insert the gearbox into the pilot hole
steps.purpose: Seat the Z-axis gearbox into its installation location in the actuator base.
steps.instruction: Insert the gearbox into the pilot hole.
steps.expected_result: The gearbox is inserted into the pilot hole.
steps.healthy_condition: The gearbox is seated in the pilot hole.
steps.failure_condition: The gearbox cannot be inserted into the pilot hole or does not seat as expected.

actions.label: Insert gearbox
actions.exact_action: Insert the gearbox into the pilot hole.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the gearbox figure to identify the gearbox component and installation context.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the gearbox cannot be inserted into the pilot hole.
Stop or escalate if seating or fit cannot be confirmed from the available source information.

source_evidence.text: Insert the gearbox into the pilot hole. [Image support needed: figure or photo showing the gearbox location and the pilot hole where it is inserted.]

steps.title: Mount the timing pulley on the gearbox
steps.purpose: Install the timing pulley onto the gearbox using the separately referenced installation instructions.
steps.instruction: Mount a timing pulley on the gearbox, using the referenced "Installation" procedure on page 168 for the pulley installation details.
steps.expected_result: A timing pulley is mounted on the gearbox.
steps.healthy_condition: The timing pulley is mounted on the gearbox using the referenced installation procedure.
steps.failure_condition: The timing pulley cannot be mounted on the gearbox using the referenced installation procedure, or required installation details are unavailable in this subsection.

actions.label: Mount timing pulley
actions.exact_action: Mount a timing pulley on the gearbox.

actions.label: Use referenced installation procedure
actions.exact_action: Use the referenced "Installation" procedure on page 168 for the pulley installation details.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the timing pulley figure to identify the timing pulley assembly and related installation features.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the timing pulley cannot be mounted using the referenced installation procedure.
Stop or escalate if additional installation details such as torque, alignment, or acceptance checks are needed but not available in this source subsection.

source_evidence.text: Mount a timing pulley on the gearbox, using the referenced "Installation" procedure on page 168 for the pulley installation details.
The timing pulley mounting step explicitly depends on a separate referenced installation section on page 168.

success_criteria: The gearbox is seated in the pilot hole.
A timing pulley is mounted on the gearbox.
healthy_conditions: The gearbox is inserted and seated in the pilot hole.
The timing pulley is mounted on the gearbox using the referenced installation procedure.
failure_conditions: The gearbox cannot be inserted into the pilot hole.
The timing pulley cannot be mounted on the gearbox using the referenced installation procedure.
Required acceptance checks, torque values, or alignment verification details are needed but are not provided in this source subsection.
escalation_guidance: Escalate to L2 support if the gearbox cannot be inserted into the pilot hole.
Escalate to L2 support if the timing pulley cannot be mounted using the referenced installation procedure.
Escalate for SME review if torque values, alignment verification, or acceptance criteria are required for execution.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Timing pulley identification and related assembly features.

missing_details: The source subsection does not provide acceptance checks.
The source subsection does not provide torque values.
The source subsection does not provide alignment verification details.
The source subsection does not provide explicit tools beyond the referenced installation instructions.
The source subsection text content is not present in the packet beyond the candidate extraction and source references.
